reason: reka-ui 2.9.9 primitives / data-state theming / Vue 3 portal gotcha — implement agent MUST know that <SelectPortal> renders to body and escapes the component's scoped style. Without :deep(), .models-tab__content[data-v-xxx] selectors won't match the portaled DOM. This is the actual root cause being fixed in this round.
color tokens (--color-bg-surface, --color-bg-border, --color-accent) used by SelectContent — implement agent must reference the same tokens so the dark Prussian blue visual stays consistent
spec forbids reka-ui Popover/DropdownMenu for chip-attached dropdowns. The Select in SettingsModal is a SEPARATE use case (form control inside Dialog). This fix does not violate the spec.
Vue 3 scoped style conventions — implement agent must know that trigger (in-component) keeps scoped selector, but content/viewport/option (in portal) need :deep() prefix
spec index — agent checks whether the existing scoped-style / portal gotcha is already documented; if not, it should be added in spec update (Phase 3.3)
